feature1_zonal_summary_statistics.json.description: Compute multiple summary statistics for a polygon over a named raster and preserve the identifier column.

feature2_implicit_single_raster_statisti.description: Compute statistics with implicit operation names when exactly one single-band raster is supplied.

feature3_category_fraction_columns.json.description: Return one fraction column per observed raster category across all processed features.

feature4_empty_and_nodata_intersections..description: Report neutral numeric results for features outside the raster or inside cells with no valid values.

feature5_attribute_passthrough.json.description: Copy selected non-geometric feature attributes into every output row alongside computed statistics.

feature6_cell_level_outputs.json.description: Emit one output row per intersecting cell when cell-level statistics are requested.

feature7_scaled_raster_cells.json.description: Apply stored scale and offset metadata before returning raster cell values.

feature8_identifier_field_formatting.jso.description: Rename or type-convert the output identifier field while preserving the feature identity value.

feature9_geometry_and_spatial_reference_.description: Preserve input geometry and spatial reference when geometry output is requested for a geometry-capable output format.

_constraints.input_condition: Feature geometry does not overlap any valid or no-data raster cells.
_constraints.output_rule: Count statistics return 0; Mean and Mode statistics return NaN or integer no-data sentinel.

_constraints.input_condition: Statistics operation is 'frac' on a named raster of integer dtype.
_constraints.output_rule: Schema dynamically expands to include a column for every distinct category observed in the raster; category fractions are 0 for missing categories.

_constraints.input_condition: Input contains exactly one raster AND that raster has no 'name' field.
_constraints.output_rule: Statistic column headers use the operation name directly, omitting the raster prefix.

_constraints.input_condition: Input contains >1 raster OR the raster is named.
_constraints.output_rule: Statistic column headers MUST include the raster name prefix (e.g., <name>_<operation>).
Output CSV columns follow order: ['<Identifier>'] + ['<Attribute>'] (sorted/stable) + ['<Statistic>'] (sorted/stable). Attribute values are repeated for every row.
One output row per policy/raster cell intersecting the polygon.

Each row column value represents the fractional area of that specific raster cell within the polygon. If a cell has no overlap, it may appear as NaN or 0.0 depending on implementation, but the rule is fractional area relative to the raster extent covered by the polygon.
Each row column value is the raw raster cell value or the scaled cell value.
Cell values returned in 'values' or 'operation' columns must be: original_value * scale + offset.
The output column name must be renamed to 'identifier_output_name'; the value must be converted if 'identifier_output_type' is specified (e.g., string to float).
Output must be a domain-specific low-level text format (e.g., 'fields=...;geometry_type=...;srs_contains_vermont=true;').

_constraints.input_condition: Statistics are defined with explicit 'raster' field (e.g., 'raster': 'metric').
Raster contains all NaN (float) or all configured nodata (int) values; operation is 'mode'.
_constraints.output_rule: Mode output returns the configured no-data sentinel for integers, or NaN for floats.
The output string must explicitly contain the original geometry string and SRS information.
Only attributes listed in 'copy_attributes' are included in output; unused attributes are ignored for output formatting.

hide.replacement: a fractional area value relative to the raster extent
